## Summary
- Linked Issue(s): [e.g., WEDA-XX]
- Area: frontend/

## Checklist
- [ ] Title includes WEDA identifier (e.g., [WEDA-XX])
- [ ] Branch is feature branch (feat/<area>-<desc>)
- [ ] Builds locally: `npm --prefix frontend run build`
- [ ] Lints clean: `npm --prefix frontend run lint`
- [ ] A11y smoke passes or issues documented
- [ ] Perf bundle size within budget or variance explained
- [ ] Screenshots / notes for UI changes included
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env.example` updated if needed
- [ ] Tested navigation and auth flows if applicable

## Notes
- Any known follow-ups or risks:
